plugins.name: workflow
plugins.description: Workflow system for AI-driven development with dual execution modes (Subagent/Current Session), two approval strategies (Step Manual Approve/Final Approve), and persistent file-based state tracking
plugins.author: AI Development Team

skills.name: workflow:bootstrap
skills.description: Initialize a new workflow task - creates PLAN.md and initial step files from task description

skills.name: workflow:implementer
skills.description: Execute implementation work for a workflow step - modifies code and updates step tracking files

skills.name: workflow:verifier
skills.description: Test a workflow step and mark complete - runs verification criteria and gates advancement

skills.name: workflow:execute
skills.description: Orchestrate workflow execution - reads state, confirms mode, handles approvals, chooses execution method (Subagent or Current Session)

skills.name: workflow:finalize
skills.description: Create final commit after workflow completion - summarizes all steps and updates status to complete
